{{Quote|We stepped out of the cramped reek of our interstellar prison into the light of an unfamiliar sun.|[[Sorzus Syn]]|<ref name="Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref>}}
'''Horuset''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Horuset system]] in [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Space]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by a sole [[Planet/Legends|planet]], [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], as well as two debris belts. The star had a red [[Color/Legends|color]].<ref name="CotG" />
{{Star-stub}}
